caption: A man with glasses and long hair tied back stands behind a podium, speaking into a microphone. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt under a dark vest decorated with blue floral embroidery and a red beaded necklace. He is positioned in front of a background of brown horizontal blinds. In the foreground, the backs of the heads of several audience members are visible, including people with blonde and grey hair. A black sign on the podium displays the white text "ORCA". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his hands near the podium. The overall composition remains static, with only slight changes in the man's facial expression and hand movements as he continues to address the crowd.
